profiles.notes: Broad seeded Cyrillic to Latin mapping. Follows approximate BGN/PCGN conventions for Russian. Soft/hard signs are dropped in output.
Broad seeded Cherokee syllabary to Latin mapping. Based on standard syllabary chart equivalences.
Broad hint transliteration only. Not IAST or ISO 15919. Aspirates marked with h digraphs. Retroflex not distinguished from dental.
Broad hint transliteration only. Short vowels may be absent or approximated. Emphatic consonants not distinguished. Not ALA-LC.
Broad hint transliteration only. Unpointed text may have ambiguous vowels. Not ALA-LC or Academy of Hebrew Language standard.
Modified Hepburn romanization of Hiragana. Long vowels not marked. Double consonants shown as geminate. Standard for most English contexts.
Modified Hepburn romanization of Katakana. Same conventions as Hiragana Hepburn. Long vowel marker (ー) rendered as vowel repetition.
Revised Romanization of Korean (South Korean official standard). Aspirated stops shown with h digraphs. Tense consonants shown as doubled. Assimilation rules partially applied.
Pinyin romanization (PRC standard) of Mandarin Chinese. Tones marked with diacritics on vowels. Requires character-to-pinyin lookup; seeded examples only. Not a full character database.
Broad Modern Greek to Latin transliteration. Follows approximate ELOT 743 conventions. Ancient Greek not covered. Diacritics stripped in output.
Approximate Paiboon romanization of Thai. Tones not fully captured. Vowel length marked by vowel repetition. Initial consonant class distinction not shown. Not Royal Institute standard.
Broad BGN/PCGN-style Ukrainian Cyrillic to Latin. Distinct from Russian: Ukrainian /і/ → i, /и/ → y, /г/ → h (not g).
Broad Bengali (Bangla) to Latin transliteration hint. Not ISO 15919. Aspirates shown with h-digraph. Retroflex approximated.
Broad Tamil to Latin transliteration hint. Distinctive phonemes (ழ /ɻ/, ள /ɭ/, ற /r/) approximated. Not ISO 15919 or Madras University scheme.
Broad Telugu to Latin transliteration hint. Retroflex consonants approximated. Not ISO 15919.
Broad Marathi Devanagari to Latin transliteration hint. Same scheme as Hindi but applied to Marathi orthography.
Broad Punjabi Gurmukhi to Latin transliteration hint. Aspirates shown with h-digraph. Retroflex approximated.
Broad Urdu (Nastaliq Arabic script) to Latin transliteration hint. Short vowels often absent in orthography; approximated here. Not ALA-LC.
Broad Amharic Ethiopic (Ge'ez script) to Latin transliteration hint. Each Ethiopic character encodes consonant+vowel. Not ISO or UNGEGN standard.
Broad Persian/Farsi Perso-Arabic to Latin transliteration hint. Persian uses additional letters beyond Arabic (پ/چ/ژ/گ). Not ALA-LC or UN standard. Short vowels approximated.
Jyutping romanization of Cantonese (Traditional Chinese characters). Tones marked with numbers 1-6. Requires character-to-Jyutping lookup; seeded examples only. Not a full character database.
